We Come to You
Veteran-Owned Mobile Truck Repair — CARB Testing, DOT Inspections, Tractor Regeneration & More. Available 24/7 in Montclair, CA & the Greater Los Angeles Area.
What We Do

Comprehensive Fleet Services

From roadside emergencies to scheduled maintenance, we keep your fleet moving with certified expertise and fast response times.

🔬
CARB Testing
Clean truck CARB compliance testing performed on-site or at your location. Fast, reliable, and certified.
📋
DOT Inspections
Certified DOT inspections to keep your vehicles compliant and road-ready at all times.
♻️
Tractor Regeneration
DPF and exhaust system regeneration services to restore full engine performance and reduce emissions.
🔧
Engine Diagnostics
Advanced diagnostic scanning to identify and resolve engine issues fast, right at your location.
🛢️
Oil Change
Fleet oil changes with commercial-grade lubricants, done at your location to minimize downtime.
⚡
Electrical Repair
Full electrical diagnostics and repair for trailers, trucks, and heavy commercial equipment.
🔋
Battery Service
Battery testing, replacement, and charging system service for all commercial vehicles.
🛑
Brakes
Air and hydraulic brake inspection, adjustment, and full replacement to keep you safe.
🔩
Steering & Suspension
Suspension alignment and steering component repair for stable, safe handling on the road.
⚙️
Transmission
Transmission diagnostics, fluid service, and repair for all commercial truck types.
🔨
Welding
On-site welding services for structural repairs, frame work, and custom fabrication needs.
🚛
Mobile & Roadside
We come to you — roadside, at your yard, or wherever your truck needs us. Available 24/7.

About Us

Built on Service & Integrity

Professional Elite Fleet Services is a veteran-owned mobile truck repair and fleet maintenance company based in Montclair, CA. We proudly serve Los Angeles and surrounding areas with certified, fast, and reliable services.

Our team specializes in CARB testing, DOT inspections, tractor regeneration, engine diagnostics, welding, and full mobile repair — bringing professional-grade service directly to your location, 24 hours a day.

Whether you're a solo owner-operator or managing a large commercial fleet, we deliver the honest, expert service that keeps your business moving and your trucks compliant. Call us for discounted fleet accounts.

🎖️ Veteran Owned & Operated
📍

Based in Montclair, CA — we travel to your location anywhere in the Los Angeles and Inland Empire region.

Breakdowns don't wait for business hours. Neither do we. Available around the clock, every day of the week.
